name: Patient Case
history: Academic underperformance despite being described as intelligent. Attended a college (institution X), felt isolated, and dropped out. About two years of credits remain to complete the degree. Mother had high expectations. Financial difficulties and pressure from the mother to return home.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't meet expectations, I will be seen as a failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't succeed no matter how hard I try.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of academic responsibilities and social situations.
situation: Experienced an unproductive week due to scheduling problems. Comparing themselves to their sister's achievements and time management.
auto_thought: I will never be as successful as my sister.
behavior: Procrastination and withdrawal from social interactions.
